programs.title: It's a Wonderful Knife
programs.desc: A year ago, teenage Winnie Carruthers (Jane Widdop) had to face a psychopathic murderer, Henry Waters (Justin Long), on Christmas Eve, whose victim was also her best friend.Now it's Christmas again in the town of Angel Falls.Winnie still remembers the tragic events, although her father David (Joel McHale) and other loved ones advise her to leave the difficult past behind.A misunderstood girl on a bridge on Christmas night makes a wish - she would prefer to have never been born.He then finds himself in a nightmarish parallel universe.He discovers that without her, everything could have turned out much worse.No one recognizes her here, she is a stranger even to her family and friends.And what's worse, Henry is still alive and the mayor of Angel Falls.The teenager must regain her former life and face a bloodthirsty murderer.A bloody variation on the famous Christmas classic - "It's a Wonderful Life" by Frank Capra.

programs.title: Little Emma
programs.desc: A little girl named Emma was raised by animals.Her life is full of warmth and joy until one of her friends discovers the unpleasant truth that she was actually adopted and is not part of their family.Devastated, Emma sets out on a journey to find her loved ones.Along the way, he gathers an extraordinary team, including the clumsy inventor Żółwik Bystrzak, the ambitious scientist Edward Wilk and the brave Weasel Sancho.Together they are looking for a mysterious island which, according to legend, is inhabited by tiny people.

programs.title: Book of Dragons
programs.desc: Hiccup, Astrid, Fishlegs and Gobber learn the secrets of the dragons contained in the book.Gobber tells the others the story of Borek the Unlucky, who was the first to describe these unusual creatures.

programs.title: E Poi Si Vede
programs.desc: Three friends compete for an attractive job at the city hall.Federico relies on his father's connections, Fabrizio feels that he is born for this job, and Luca is always lucky.

programs.title: P.S. I Love You
programs.desc: After the death of her husband Gerry (Gerard Butler), Holly (Hilary Swank) falls into a deep depression.On her 30th birthday, a woman receives a mysterious parcel.The cake comes with a tape with a recorded message from... Gerry.He encourages his beloved to go out and have fun with friends.After this event, new letters regularly arrived to the young widow, each ending with a declaration of love.Gerry knew how much his wife would suffer from losing him.In letters written before her death, he encourages her to take on various challenges.Thanks to her extraordinary sense of connection with the deceased, a woman in despair undergoes specific therapy and tries to start her life anew.

programs.title: Big Fish
programs.desc: Edward Bloom (Albert Finney), a brilliant storyteller and favorite of the neighborhood, is dying.His son Will (Billy Crudup) left home long ago, not wanting to live forever in the shadow of his father's fantastic stories.Now she returns to accompany him in his last moments.Listening to Edward's stories again, Will tries to put them together to make sense.The picture that emerges is surprisingly coherent and shows the father's life in a new light.The son realizes who his father really was.Tim Burton, one of the most eccentric creators of American cinema, created a film that captivates with its warmth, fairy-tale atmosphere and surreal poetics.The script is based on the novel "Big Fish: A Story of Mythic Proportions" by Daniel Wallace.We will see Ewan McGregor as young Edward.The atmospheric music received an Oscar nomination.
